CustomField.description: Optional. Leave blank to apply the rule whenever the field is masked. Set to an Apex class name (e.g. API_SendEmail) to restrict the rule to calls from that class only — useful when you want a rule to apply only in the context of one API service or integration and not everywhere that field is used.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Leave blank for all callers. Set to an Apex class name to restrict to calls from that class only.
CustomField.label: Caller Class
